typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		SolutionGroup as string,
		TotalInstances as integer,
		sourcesystem as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'with cte1 as (   SELECT    top (12)    replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(SolutionGroup,\'MW Config - \',\'\'),\'App Products Patch - \',\'\'),\'DB Config - \',\'\'), \'Qualys Path \' ,\'\'),\'MW EOL - \',\'\'),\'MW Patching - \',\'\'),\'DB EOL - \',\'\'),\'App Products EOL - \',\'\')  SolutionGroup, sum(instances) TotalInstances     FROM [PLHS].[dbo].[vw_WFT_TCOO_iTracker_Metrics_TopCounts_LastMonth]     where ResponsibleParty in (\'Application Team\',\'Assigned Product/Platform\') and FeedType =\'Qualys\'   group by SolutionGroup   order by TotalInstances desc   ) , cte2 as (      SELECT    top (12)    replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(A.SolutionGroup,\'MW Config - \',\'\'),\'App Products Patch - \',\'\'),\'DB Config - \',\'\'), \'Qualys Path \' ,\'\'),\'MW EOL - \',\'\'),\'MW Patching - \',\'\'),\'DB EOL - \',\'\'),\'App Products EOL - \',\'\')  SolutionGroup, sum(instances) TotalInstances     FROM [PLHS].[dbo].[vw_WFT_TCOO_iTracker_Metrics_TopCounts_LastMonth] A       where ResponsibleParty in (\'Application Team\',\'Assigned Product/Platform\') and FeedType !=\'Qualys\'   group by SolutionGroup   order by TotalInstances desc   )     select *, \'Qualys\' sourcesystem from cte1   union all    select *, \'Non-Qualys\'  sourcesystem from cte2',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> iTracker
iTracker derive(import_date = currentDate()) ~> DerivedColumn
DerivedColumn sink(input(
		SolutionGroup as string,
		import_date as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy'
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		SolutionGroup,
		import_date)) ~> OLEDBDestination
